utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: (1) health_coverage, (2) property_coverage, (3) travel_coverage, (4) additional_services, and (5) total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all five sections, each clearly detailed. The health_coverage includes both physical and mental health with costs; property_coverage covers home contents with cost; travel_coverage includes travel insurance details with cost; additional_services lists enhancement services and their costs; total_budget provides monthly and annual cost breakdown. All are fully specified as required.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan repeatedly references the 'LifeFirst Complete Coverage Package,' which encompasses physical health, mental health, property, and travel components. In the ground-truth dataset, the closest matches are the 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' for both physical and mental health, 'LifeFirst Standard Coverage' for property, and 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' for travel insurance. These are the only LifeFirst options listed and align with the described coverage scope (comprehensive, mid-range cost). Therefore, we map each component to its corresponding LifeFirst entry in the ground-truth ratings. No separate ratings exist for the 'Complete Coverage Package' as a unified product, so each segment is mapped to its specific LifeFirst component rating.
